productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas, suede and nubuck upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperPerforated nubuck forefoot, suede midfoot side panels and canvas overlays for absolute breathable comfort and supportHigh ankle for enhanced support to the lower leg and to offer a better FitPerforated nubuck tongue with a fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised fitMidsoleEVA midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs throughout the and has ridges at the upper midfoot for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the suede and nubuck patches using a suede and nubuck brushTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
